Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Lx Hausys America Inc. To Produce Its Custodian Of Records For Deposition And Produce Documents At Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs KRISTIAN FIGUEROA LOPEZ,and MARIA GONZALEZ's Motion To Compel Defendant Lx Hausys America Inc. To Produce Its Custodian Of Records For Deposition And Produce Documents At Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions.(PB provided memo)

Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Defendant Lx Hausys America Inc. to Produce Its Custodian of Records for Deposition and Produce Documents is GRANTED. The discovery request is reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. (CCP Section 2017.010.) Defendant's flat refusal to produce the witness for months lacks substantial justification as plaintiff is entitled to inquire regarding case-specific facts. Defendant shall produce the witness and pay $2,660 to Plaintiff as sanctions within 30 days of notice of entry of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and must drop a hard copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
